arts.ttl: Fans SLAM 'disgrace' decision to award Liverpool a penalty at Bournemouth after Cody Gakpo was fouled by Lewis Cook
arts.sum: After an even start to the match, Arne Slot's side were handed a spotkick after Lewis Cook was deemed to have fouled Cody Gakpo.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive clear referee verdict on Cody Gakpo penalty decision vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as the Reds were awarded a controversial first half penalty to gain the advantage over AFC Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Transfer News: Mohamed Salah replacement Rayan Cherki agrees move - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Rayan Cherki, the man prominently tipped to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool, has greenlit a transfer to Borussia Dortmund, according to Fabrizio Romano. He already wanted out in the summer, but no transfer materialised and he instead signed a one-year contract extension until 2026 to avoid a Salah situation.

arts.ttl: Trouble brewing? Darwin Nunez 'would have liked' chance to speak with Saudi giants
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Darwin Nunez has reportedly been left frustrated after the club turned down a substantial transfer offer from Al-Nassr for his services.

arts.ttl: Napoli on alert as Chiesa left out of Liverpool squad
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa’s Liverpool future is back up in the air after the Italy international was...

arts.ttl: Official: Las Palmas land Liverpool youngster
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Las Palmas have this weekend announced fresh reinforcements to the club’s engine room ranks. The latest player to have put pen to paper on terms in Gran…

arts.ttl: 3pm team news: Liverpool + Everton XIs as expected
arts.sum: Gameweek 24 'doublers' Liverpool and Everton are among the teams in action The post 3pm team news: Liverpool + Everton XIs as expected appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Eli Kroupi: Bournemouth to sign 18-year-old compared to Neymar
arts.sum: Bournemouth have already snapped up Dango Ouattara from their sister club, yet Kroupi could prove to be an even shrewder signing, with the teenager having already impressed in his homeland, where he played top-flight football, becoming the youngest player ever to score a double in a Ligue 1 game. Bournemouth are set to complete a €10 million transfer for a teenager who has been favourably compared to Neymar.

arts.ttl: Rio Ngumoha leaves Chelsea shattered again as Liverpool complete remarkable comeback
arts.sum: Liverpool produced a remarkable comeback as they beat Chelsea 3-2 in the U18 Premier League Cup on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool trio return from injury as Slot names starting XI vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Liverpool have been boosted by the return of Diogo Jota, Darwin Nunez and Curtis Jones from injury as Arne Slot named a strong starting XI to face Bournemouth on Saturday. The trio were all named on the bench for the trip to the Vitality Stadium, although there was no place for Joe Gomez in the […] The post Liverpool trio return from injury as Slot names starting XI vs Bournemouth first appeared on The Football Faithful.
